content:
Hey everyone! I was working on a Node.js project and realized I needed a better way to handle data models. I built and just published justwork-model-ts.It's built specifically for TypeScript and helps structure backend database schemas cleanly. You can grab it directly from the marketplace here: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=EllaAndy.justwork-model-ts Would love any feedback, feature requests, or code reviews!
